Created attachment 143511
kmfl-sil-galatia-1.03_1.patch

Log:
 * add stage support
 * correct use of DOCS
 * use pkg-plist: this was the easiest way to (1) handle all neccessary @dirrmtry, (2) avoid creating empty dir without DOCS (share/doc/kmfl)
 * use pkg-message
New files:
 pkg-plist, files/pkg-message.in
